mapper.select:
SELECT b.id id, b.enterprise_id enterpriseId, b.approve_id approveId, b.belog_dept belogDept, b.apply_user_name applyUserName, b.cost_type costtype, c.process_name costtype2, b.deal_amount dealAmount, b.company_name companyName, b.apply_date applyDate, b.subject subject, b.receive_company_name receiveCompanyName, b.bank_name bankName, b.bank_account bankAccount, b.remark remark, b.file_id fileId FROM t_apply_business_pay b left join t_pm_approve c on c.id = b.approve_id where b.status='D'
AND b.apply_user_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{applyUserName},'%')
AND b.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{companyName},'%')
AND b.subject LIKE CONCAT('%',#{subject},'%')
AND DATE_FORMAT( b.apply_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(b.apply_date, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{endTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND b.deal_amount >= #{amount}
AND b.deal_amount <= #{amount2}
AND c.process_name='费用申请'
AND c.process_name='经营费用申请'
AND c.process_name='管理费用申请'
AND c.process_name='业务退款申请'
and b.cost_type IN
#{typeList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ORDER BY b.id DESC

SELECT p.apply_user_id AS applyUserId, SUM(p.deal_amount) AS dealAmount FROM t_apply_business_pay p LEFT JOIN t_pm_approve a ON p.approve_id = a.id WHERE a.process_id = 243 AND a.`status` = 'D' AND p.cost_type IN ('4','6', '8') AND DATE_FORMAT(a.last_approve_date, '%Y-%m') = #{baseDate} GROUP BY p.apply_user_id
